summary:
Annealing refers to a thermal process used for treating metals; it reduces internal stresses and increases malleability. The closest equivalent concept among provided choices relates to stress-relieving treatments that mimic this effect in different contexts such as medicine.
``` Summary
Annealing describes a thermal processing method typically used for metals to reduce internal stresses and improve flexibility. Within medical procedures, an analogous technique would be one aimed at reducing structural tension similarly via targeted localized warming methods.
```
